name: Log Export Job
description: Exports application logs to the archive storage system for compliance retention and long-term analysis.

name: Log Cleanup Job
description: Removes outdated log files after archiving and verifies retention policy compliance.

name: Log Audit Job
description: Audits log integrity and generates compliance reports for the internal audit team.

name: Database Backup
description: Performs a full daily backup of the primary customer database to the redundant storage cluster.
